_purpose: Pre-registered family outcome record — companion to family_commitment_20260501.json. Records the IS verdict for all 5 variants and the family-level decision per the pre-registered protocol.

variant_outcomes.dnf_reason: Registry/catalog mismatch: comp_defensive and flow_net_inflow_20d are present in factor_registry/factor_master.parquet (is_current=true) but factor_library/catalog.py does not contain Qlib expressions for them. Resolver approved the components; dataset_build hard-failed at handle_validation_dataset_build with KeyError. The pre-flight registry check verified registry membership but did NOT verify catalog wiring — this is the gap to close in future pre-flights.

h2_minus_h1_defensive_component_isolated.interpretation: risk_vol_60d at w=0.7 lower-is-better PRESERVED signal (rank_icir grew, contradicting prior fear of growth-vs-low-vol cancellation); REDUCED DD by 9.4%; INCREASED turnover by 1.32x because 60d rolling vol updates daily and churns at the cutoff.

h4_minus_h1_universe_filter_isolated.interpretation: Universe filter ret250_pctile_max=0.95 + liquidity_floor 20M->50M had ZERO effect on cross-sectional rank_icir (computed before filtering, per Layer 1 of four-layer pipeline) and ACTIVELY HURT both DD (+0.021) and turnover (+1.30). Removing top-5% trailing winners removed names that had already proved to ride the GARP signal smoothly, leaving the portfolio holding higher-vol mid-caps.

h5_minus_h2_universe_plus_zscore_on_h2_c.interpretation: Stacking the H4 universe filter and zscore composite onto H2 components dropped rank_icir by 10.6% (zscore overweighted low-vol relative to growth) and dropped DD only marginally (-3%, sub-additive with H2's defensive component because both target overlapping high-vol tails). DROPPED turnover by 2.46x — the only family member to push turnover under 8x. zscore's smoother continuous score caused FEWER threshold-crossings than rank_weighted, contrary to my pre-registered prior.

ablation_findings.structural_finding: All 4 evaluable variants fail the 0.32 max_drawdown floor and the 3.5x annual_turnover floor. The signal side is consistently strong (DSR=1.0, rank_icir 0.49-0.55, rank_ic 0.048-0.079 vs baseline 0.038). The structural deficiency is on the risk/cost side: long-only equal-weight TopK at any feasible (topk, rebalance, composite, universe) combination within v1 hypothesis_validation knobs cannot deliver investment-grade DD or turnover for this growth signal. Defensive ballast (H2) and stacking (H5) reduced DD by 5-10% relative to frame-only (H1) — meaningful but not enough.

path_a_strategy_improvement_factor_mix_d.expected_value: low — strategy_improvement does factor-mix discovery within FAMILY_CAPS, but the family's DD failure was structural (long-only concentration) rather than factor-mix; auto-search across factor mixes is unlikely to clear 0.32 DD floor. Worth running as a cheap sanity check.

path_b_custom_portfolio_overlay.expected_value: medium — vol-targeting (e.g., 12% annualized) + per-sector caps (e.g., 25%) + position-band rebalance triggers should reduce DD by ~30-40% relative to H5's 0.459 (toward 0.27-0.30 range). Bypasses orchestrator's seal-aware path; requires manual sealed-OOS reproduction.

path_c_validation_v2_schema_extension.expected_value: high — extending PortfolioSide to include market_neutral and adding score_proportional weighting addresses BOTH DD and turnover structurally. But scope is large and requires its own plan.
path_c_validation_v2_schema_extension.next_action: Defer to separate plan after Path B

h3_remediation.issue: Registry/catalog mismatch: comp_defensive, flow_net_inflow_20d in factor_master.parquet but missing from factor_library/catalog.py
options: Add catalog entries with PIT-safe Qlib expressions (must satisfy CLAUDE.md §3 — every $field wrapped in Ref())
Mark these factors as deprecated in the registry until catalog is wired
Tighten pre-flight check to verify catalog membership AND registry membership
h3_remediation.next_action: Tighten pre-flight check. Decide whether comp_defensive / flow_net_inflow_20d are worth catalog-wiring effort based on Phase 5 outcomes — if Path B succeeds, these may not be needed.

documentation_obligations_remaining: Add update note to project_state.md: growth-strategy v2 family rejected, all seals preserved, Phase 5 Path B recommended
Note registry/catalog gap as a system finding worth surfacing to CLAUDE.md or scripts/run_daily_qa.py
Author Phase 5 Path B plan as a separate document
